name: FAI_SAM_BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_VL
query: Select B.BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_ID ,B.OBJECT_KEY ,B.PROCESS_KEY ,B.OBJECT_TYPE ,TL.OBJECT_NAME ,TL.PRODUCT ,TL.DESCRIPTION ,B.SEQUENCER ,B.CREATED_BY ,B.CREATION_DATE ,B.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,B.ENTERPRISE_ID ,B.SGUID ,B.MODULE_ID ,B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM FAI_SAM_BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_B B, FAI_SAM_BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_TL TL WHERE B.BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_ID = TL.BASE_SEQUENCE_OBJ_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
